metadata.name: Add Frequent Flyer Number to Booking

description: A passenger forgot to add their frequent flyer number when booking and wants to add it to earn miles.

nodes.task_description: Collect the passenger's frequent flyer program and number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly records the loyalty information.

nodes.task_description: Update the booking with the frequent flyer number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully adds the loyalty number to the reservation.
